calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-12-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-12-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-victoire, S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tina Paxton.
Jak Marquez, Esq. for Plaintiff: Ambassador Hotel Assoc., a California limited partnership.
Plaintiff's Witness: James Steeley, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Billy Bridgewater.
Exh. 1 - Residential Rental Agreement----------ID/EVID.
Exh. 2 - Threeday Notice-----------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Billy Bridgewater as follows:
Restitution and possession of the property located at 355 Mason St., #328, San Francisco.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Back-Rents and Damages $608.88
Costs $263.00, for a Total of $871.88
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Present:
Jak Steven Marquez, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff
Roll call taken before Commisioner Kaplan and Defendant Billy Bridgewater not present. Matter taken off calendar.
